React.useEffect(()=>{if(fetchAttempted)return;setFetchAttempted(true);const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(!token){setLoading(false);return;}axios.get("".concat(process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'https://soldikeeper-backend-production.up.railway.app/api',"/admin/agents/communications?limit=100"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}}).then(res=>{if(res.data.success){setCommunications(res.data.communications||[]);}setLoading(false);}).catch(error=>{console.error('Failed to fetch agent communications:',error);setLoading(false);});},[fetchAttempted]);// WebSocket real-time updates

newSocket.on('agent:communication',data=>{console.log('New communication:',data);setCommunications(prev=>[data,...prev].slice(0,100));});newSocket.on('disconnect',()=>{console.log('❌ WebSocket disconnected');});setSocket(newSocket);return()=>{newSocket.close();};},[]);// Remove token dependency
